headline: If You Invested $1,000 In Apple Stock When Tim Cook Became CEO, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
summary: Technology giant Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) has had several CEOs leading the company over the years, including co-founder Steve Jobs heading the company through a period of innovative products like the iPod, iPhone and iPad.

headline: This Tesla Product Doesn't Appear In Portfolio Slide Shown At Semi Launch Event: Analyst Says 'It's A Mistake To Skip' It
Elon Musk's Tweet About Buying Coca-Cola Isn't Hanging In The Louvre But It Might Be Hanging At Twitter HQ
summary: The world’s richest man took over leading social media platform Twitter and has made several changes. One of which may be some new wall hangings at the company's headquarters featuring his favorite tweets.

headline: 'Rich Dad Poor Dad' Author On Why Silicon Valley Fears Elon Musk's Twitter: 'He Doesn't Need A Job Or Money'
summary: "Rich Dad Poor Dad"  author  Robert Kiyosaki  who endorsed Donald Trump  in the 2016 election and has co-authored two books with the former president, on Saturday took to Twitter to extend his support for Elon Musk.

headline: Twitter Files Revealed: Musk Reacts To Exposure Of Company's Response To Hunter Biden Story
summary: To restore public trust in Twitter, CEO Elon Musk hinted last month that he would release internal communications showing how Twitter censored a story about Hunter Biden's laptop just ahead of the 2020 presidential election
